rag_rules: Generate AGREE annex blocks inside `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Place assumptions and guarantees in component type annexes when they relate to component ports
Use implementation annexes for implementation-level bindings such as assignments
Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes
Use assign only when the left-hand side is an existing output feature or declared auxiliary variable in implementation scope
generic_rules: Use concrete bounds, named constants, or visible relations in assumptions and guarantees
Avoid using AADL property names directly in AGREE expressions unless they are exposed as ports or constants
Use visible feature names in contracts to maintain traceability
Place deterministic dependency guarantees in component type annexes
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use `eq name : type = expression;` for equations and `const name : type = value;` for constants
Use `assign output = expression;` for implementation-level bindings
anti_patterns: Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope
Do not use subcomponent ports in component type contracts unless represented through variables or outputs
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions without explicit ports or constants
